Romans 15:4: Inaki onsi ayatang’anete koriikwa korwa kare nigo arigetwe ase ogotworokereria intwe, erinde ase oboremereria na ase okoremigwa tokonyora korwa ase amariiko, tonyare koba nogosemeria.
Romans 15:13: Naboigo Nyasae bw’ogosemerigwa abaichorie n’omogooko bwonsi na omorembe ase okwegena, monyare komenta mono ase ogosemeria ase chinguru chi’Omoika Omochenu.
1 Corinthians 1:9: Nyasae nomwegenwa, oyobarangeirie mosoe ase obomo bw’Omwana oye, Yeso Kristo Omonene oito.
1 Corinthians 1:30: Korende nogokora kwa Nyasae, ng’a inwe imore ime ase Kristo Yeso, oyo Nyasae akorete koba obong’aini bwaito na oboronge bwaito, naende ogochenwa gwaito na okoboorigwa gwaito.
1 Corinthians 2:9: korende buna eriikire, “Aya eriso ritaroche, gose ogoto gotaigwete, gose aya atarengereirie ase enkoro y’omonto, ayio Nyasae aroiseretie abamwanchete.”
1 Corinthians 3:16: Timomanyeti ng’a inwe ne Hekalu ya Nyasae, na Omoika o Nyasae nigo amenyete ime yaino?
1 Corinthians 10:13: Ogoteemwa tikwabanyorete inwe, otatiga okore kw’engencho ya Mwanyabaanto. Nyasae nomwegenwa, takobatiga moteemwe goetania buna chinguru chiaino ching’ana, korende amo nogoteemwa nakore egesieri mogosokera, erinde monyare gokoremereria.
1 Corinthians 13:4-7: Obwanchani nigo bokoremereria, naende nigo bokoba nobwororo. Obwanchani tibori koba ne ribero, tibori koenena, tibori gwetogia, tibokomocha koba nogosika, tibokorigia ayare ayaye, tibori kobeeigwa, tibori kobara amabe; tibokogokera obobe, korende bogokera ekeene. Obwanchani nigo bokoremereria onsi, bwegeena onsi, bosemeria onsi, bobogoria onsi.
1 Corinthians 13:13: Gaki bono biatigaire okwegena, na ogosemeria, na obwanchani, aya atato; erire rinene ase aya nobwanchani.
1 Corinthians 15:10: Korende ase obuya bwa Nyasae nabeire buna inde; na obuya bwaye bore ase ’nde tibwarenge bosa. Korende kobua mono nakorire emeremo goetania bonsi, gose tari inche, korende obuya bwa Nyasae obore amo nainche.
1 Corinthians 15:57: Korende mbuya mono ase Nyasae, ere oyogotoa okobua goetera ase Omonene oito Yeso Kristo.
1 Corinthians 16:13-14: Renda, motenene bokong’u ase okwegena kwaino, mobe abasacha, mobe ne chinguru. Amang’ana aino onsi akoreke ase obwanchani.
2 Corinthians 1:3-4: Nyasae, Tata Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, Tata bw’amaabera, Nyasae bw’okoremia gwonsi, atogigwe. Ere nigo agotoremia ase emechando yaito yonsi, erinde naintwe tonyare koremia baria bare ase emechando ende yonsi, ase okoremia okwo twaremigwe intwe abanyene na Nyasae.
2 Corinthians 3:17: Bono Omonene nere Omoika; na aase Omoika bw’Omonene ore, agwo nao obosibore bore.
2 Corinthians 4:6: Naki Nyasae oyoteebete, “Omobaso nobare korwa ase omosunte”, nere obarire ase chinkoro chiaito ime, atoe omobaso bwe chisemi chi’obonene bwa Nyasae ase obosio bwa Kristo.
2 Corinthians 4:8-9: Korwa ase chinsemo chionsi nigo tokomigwa, korende titori komigeka; iga togoichanigwa, korende titogokwa emioyo, iga togochandwa, korende titori gotigwa; iga togoakwa inse, korende titori gosirigwa.
2 Corinthians 4:16-18: Ase ayio, titogokwa emioyo; korende nonya omonto oito o isiko ogosarigwa, omonto oito o ime akorwe omoyia rituko ase rituko. Naki emechando yaito eyere y’ekero egeke gioka nemegusu, egotoroiseria obonene bwa kare na kare obore obonge mono kobua. Titorigereria ebinto ebikororekana, korende ebitakororekana; naki ebikororekana nebi’ekero egeke gioka, korende ebitakororekana nebia kare na kare.
2 Corinthians 5:7: ekiagera nigo togotaara ase okwegena, tari ase okorora.
2 Corinthians 5:17: Ase ayio, omonto karabe ime ya Kristo nigo are egetongwa ekeyia; ebia kare biaetire, rora bionsi biabeire ebiyia.
2 Corinthians 5:20: Nabo tore abatomire na Kristo; Nyasae nigo akobasorora inwe goetera ase emenwa yaito. Twabasoroire ase engencho ya Kristo: Mobwatanigwe na Nyasae.
2 Corinthians 9:7-8: Kera omonto tiga arue buna arengereretie ase enkoro yaye, tari ase ogoichana, gose tari ase okobetererigwa, ekiagera Nyasae bwanchire ere oyokorua nomogooko. Na Nyasae nanyare kobaichoria nobuya bwonsi ase obonge, erinde monyare koba nogoisaneka gwonsi ase ebinto bionsi, monyare komenta mono ase ogokora okuya,
2 Corinthians 12:9-10: Korende aganteebia, “Obuya bwane bwagoisanire, ekiagera chinguru chiane chiaikeranirie ase oboreu.” Nabo ninyetogerie amareu aane ase omogooko, erio chinguru chia Kristo chiikaranse igoro ase ’nde. Ase engencho ya Kristo nagweneirwe namareu, na ogochaaywa, na obokong’u, na okorosigwa, na emechando yonsi; ekero inde omoreu, erio nario inde ne chinguru.
Galatians 2:20: gose bono tari inche inde moyo, korende Kristo nigo are moyo ime ase ’nde; na obogima inde naborobwo bono ase omobere, nigo inde naborobwo ase okomwegena Omwana o Nyasae, oyonyanchete, naende bweruete omonyene ase engencho yane.
Galatians 5:22-23: Korende okwama kw’Omoika nobwanchani, omogooko, omorembe, oboremereria, obwororo, obuya, obwegenwa, oboitongo, okwerita ase onsi; machiko ande tari arange amang’ana buna ayio.
Galatians 6:9: Titorosa gokora amaya, ekiagera natogese ekero engaki eraike, totakweti emioyo.
Ephesians 1:3: Nyasae, Ise Omonene oito Yeso Kristo, atogigwe, ere oyotosesenetie ase Kristo nogosesenigwa gwonsi kw’omoika aase aaria igoro,
Ephesians 1:7: Ase are ere ntore nokoboorigwa ase amanyinga aye, na okwaberwa kw’ebibe biaito ase obonge bw’obuya bwaye,
Ephesians 1:18-19: naende ng’a amaiso ye chinkoro chiaino abekwe omobaso, erinde momanye ogosemeria koria abarangereretie monyore, na komanya obonda bw’obonene bw’omwando oye buna bore, obo abachenu baeirwe. Nasabire ng’a momanye obonene bw’okobua kwaye botari nekerengo, obo bwatoikeire intwe abatwegenire koreng’ana nogokora gw’okobua kwaye okonene.
Ephesians 2:4-5: Korende Nyasae, oyore n’obonge bw’amaabera, ase obwanchani bwaye obonene atwanchete, nonya n’ekero keria twareenge tokwete ase ogosaria gwaito, agatoa obogima amo na Kristo; inaki mwatoorigwe ase obuya bwa Nyasae.
Ephesians 2:8-10: Inaki mwatoorigwe ase obuya, ase enchera y’okwegena; ayio tarwete ase more abanyene, korende nekeegwa kia Nyasae; gose tari ase ogokora, monto onde taacha gwetogia. Inaki nigo tore emeremo y’amaboko aye, togatongwa ase Kristo Yeso, erinde tokore ogokora okuya okwo Nyasae aroisetie ritang’ani, erio totaare ime ase okwo.
Ephesians 3:16-17: Nasabire ng’a koreng’ana nobonda bw’obonene bwaye, abanchere momentwe chinguru ase okobua goeteera ase Omoika oye ase omonto o ime; na Kristo amenye ase chinkoro chiaino komwamwegenire. Nasabire ng’a inwe komor’abe n’emeri na oboroso ase obwanchani,
Ephesians 3:20: Gaki, ase are ere oyoranyaare gokora goetania mono kobua aya togosaba gose aya tokorengereria, koreng’ana ne chinguru chigokora emeremo ime ase tore,
Ephesians 4:2-3: ase obokanyeku bwonsi na obwororo, na ase oboremereria mokobogorerania ase obwanchani. Mokore omokia konyora obomo bw’Omoika ase egesibo ki’omorembe.
Ephesians 4:23-24: mokorwe abayia ase emeika na ebirengererio biaino, mweboyie omonto omoyia, oyotongetwe ase omogwekano o Nyasae ase oboronge na obochenu bw’ekeene.
Ephesians 4:32: Mobe nobwororo inwe ase inwe, mororerane amabeebe, na kwaberana inwe ase inwe, buna Nyasae ase Kristo abaaberete inwe.
Ephesians 5:1-2: Ase ayio, mobe abegi ba Nyasae, buna abana abanchwa; mogeende ase obwanchani, buna Kristo atwanchete intwe, naende akerua ere omonyene ase engencho yaito, akaba esadaka na ekeng’wanso, bire ogotioka okuya ase Nyasae.
Ephesians 6:10-11: Omoerio, motenene bokong’u ase Omonene, na ase chinguru chi’okobua kwaye. Eboyie ebirwanero bionsi bia Nyasae, erinde monyaare gotenena korwania obong’ainereria bwa Saitani.
Ephesians 6:13: Ase ayio, bogoria ebirwanero bionsi bia Nyasae, erinde monyaare koamererania ase rituko ri’obobe, na komwaikeranirie onsi, motenene.
Ephesians 6:17: Naende bogoria ekegogwa gi’ekioma ki’ogotooreka, na omoro bw’Omoika, n’oro ring’ana ria Nyasae.
Philippians 1:6: Ninde nobomaene, ng’a Nyasae oyochagete emeremo emiya ase emioyo yaino ime nayeikeranie goika rituko riria ria Kristo Yeso.
Philippians 1:9-10: Oko nakwo ogosaba kwane, ng’a obwanchani bwaino bomenteke, bobe obonge mono ase okomanya kw’ogwatanana gwonsi, erinde monyare komanya ayare amaya, naende mobe n’chinkoro chindemu, motari na komocha ase rituko ria Kristo.
Philippians 2:3-4: Timokora ing’ana rinde rionsi ase okwegwenera na ase okweenenia, korende ase oboitongo kera omonto abare abande ng’a nabaya kobua ere omonyene. Kera omonto tarigereria ebinto biaye omonyene, korende arigererie ebinto bi’abaanto bande.
Philippians 2:13: ekiagera Nyasae nere ogokora emeremo ime yaino ase okorigia, naende ase ogokora ogwancha kwaye okuya.
Philippians 2:14-15: Mokore amang’ana onsi motari nokwemurungania na okoborania, erinde monyare koba abatari na komocha, abachenu, abana ba Nyasae, motari na bobe egati y’ekegori eke ekebe kere bogeka. Ase egati y’abwo mobare buna emebaso ase ense.
Philippians 3:13-14: Abaminto, tinyekageti inche omonyene ng’a naikire koyabwata; korende ninkore egento ekemo gioka: kweba ayare magega, ndambaarie ayare bosio. Nakong’irie orogendo gochia aase ngokoorera, ng’ikere eng’eria y’okorangerigwa kwa igoro kwa Nyasae goetera ase Kristo Yeso.
Philippians 4:4: Goka ase Omonene amatuko onsi; naende natebiire: Goka!
Philippians 4:6-7: Timwechandera ing’ana rinde rionsi; korende ase kera ring’ana ase ogosaba na ogosorora amo nokoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono, okorigia kwaino komanyekane ase Nyasae. Na omorembe o Nyasae, oyobuete okomanya gwonsi, korende chinkoro chiaino na ebirengererio biaino ase Kristo Yeso.
Philippians 4:8: Omoerio baminto, onsi ayare ay’ekeene, onsi ayare ay’ogosika, onsi ayare ay’oboronge, onsi ayare ay’oborabu, onsi ayagwenerete gwanchwa, onsi ayagokwanwa buya; koborabeo obuya bonde bwonsi, gose ogotogigwa, aya onsi yarengererie.
Philippians 4:11-13: Tari ng’a ngokwana aya ekiagera inde nokoremerwa, naki neorokereirie goisaneka ase engencho ende yonsi inde nero. Namanyire ogokeeigwa, naende namanyire okomenteka; ase engencho yonsi, na ase amang’ana onsi neorokereirie, okoigota na koigwa enchara, okomenteka na okoremerwa. Ninyare gokora amang’ana onsi asere oyokombeka chinguru.
Philippians 4:19: Na Nyasae one nabaichorerie kera ekimoganetie ase ekerengo ki’obonda bwaye ase obonene ase Kristo Yeso.
Colossians 1:9-10: Ase ayio, korwa rituko riria twaigwete amang’ana ayio, titwatigete kobasabera inwe. Igo twasabete ng’a moichorwe ne chisemi chi’ogwancha kwaye ase obong’aini bwonsi na okomanya gwonsi kw’omoika. Mogenderere buna ebagwenerete ase Omonene, momogwenere kegima. Amagima aino ame okwama okuya, momenteke ase okomomanya Nyasae.
Colossians 1:11-12: Na inwe mobekwe chinguru ase okobua gwonsi, koreng’ana ne chinguru chi’obonene bwaye ase okoganya na oboremereria bwonsi amo nomogooko, mokomoakera Tata ng’a mbuya mono, oyobaikeranetie mobe ababwatani b’omwando bw’abachenu ase omobaso.
Colossians 1:27: Nyasae agancha koorokia ase bare obobisi boria bore obonene na obw’obonda ase egati y’abanto b’ebisaku. Obobisi boria nabwo obo, ng’a Kristo nigo are ime yaino, ayio naro ogosemeria kw’obonene.
Colossians 2:6-7: Ase ayio, buna mwamoitabire Kristo Yeso buna Omonene, naboigo mogenderere komenya ase okobwatana nere. Simeka emeri yaino ime ase are, agacha amagima aiono ase are, mokong’igwe ase okwegena buna mworokereretigwe. Na momenteke ase okoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono.
Colossians 3:1-2: Mwabokigwe ase obogima amo na Kristo, ase igo beka chinkoro chiaino ase ebinto bire igoro, aase Kristo aikaransete ase ekerogo kiaye ensemo y’okoboko gw’okorio kwa Nyasae. Rengereria ayare igoro, gose tari ayare ase ense.
Colossians 3:12-14: Inwe n’abanto ba Nyasae; ere nigo abanchete na akabachora koba abaye. Ase igo mweboyie amabeebe, obuya, obokanyeku, obwororo, oboremereria. Bogorerania inwe ase inwe, na onye omonto ore ne ring’ana igoro ase omonto onde, mwaberane: buna Omonene abaaberete inwe, nainwe mwaberane bo. Kobua aya onsi, mweboyie obwanchani, nabwo egesibo gekobwatania kera egento ase oboikeranu bw’obuya.
Colossians 3:15: Tiga omorembe o Kristo ogambere chinkoro chiaino, noro mwarangererigwe ase omobere oyomo, na mobe abakoiraneria ng’a mbuya mono.
Colossians 3:16-17: Ring’ana ria Kristo rimenye ase obonge ime yaino, mobe mokworokererania na gotebererania ase obong’aini bwonsi, mogoteera ase chizaburi, na amatera, ne chingero chi’omoika, ase ogoakera Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono ase chinkoro chiaino ime. Na kera eki mogokora, ase amang’ana gose ase ogokora, mokore kera egento ase erieta ri’Omonene Yeso, mokomoakera Nyasae Tata ng’a mbuya mono goetera asare.
Colossians 4:2: Mogenderere nogosaba, morende ase korokwo, na koiraneria ng’a mbuya mono;
1 Thessalonians 1:3: Na intwe ase obosio bwa Nyasae Tata oito titori gotiga koinyora emeremo yaino ase okwegena, na ogwechanda kwaino ase obwanchani, na oboremereria bwaino ase okomosemeri ’Omonene Yeso Kristo.
1 Thessalonians 3:12-13: Omonene abakore momenteke na gokiina ase ogwanchana inwe ase inwe, na ase ogwancha abanto bonsi, buna intwe tobanchete inwe. Ase igo anyare gokong’ia chinkoro chiaino chibe chitari na komocha, ase obochenu ase obosio bwa Nyasae, Tata oito ekero ki’ogocha kw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo amo nabachenu baaye bonsi.
1 Thessalonians 4:16-17: ekiagera Omonene omonyene naike korwa igoro neriogi rie ring’ana ri’ogochika amo neriogi ri’omomalaika omonene, na egeturi ki’egetureeri kia Nyasae. Na abwo bakwete ase Kristo nababooke ritang’ani. Erio magega y’ayio intwe, abatore moyo, abatwatigaire, inatobogorigwe amo nabarabwo gochia ase amare, erio torototere Omonene igoro gati. Nabo inatobe amo n’Omonene botambe.
1 Thessalonians 5:8: Korende intwe abatore ab’omobaso, tobe aberiiti, na tweboyie okwegena na obwanchani buna engobo y’ekioma ase ebikuba biaito, na ogosemeria kw’ogotooreka buna ekegogwa giaito gi’ekioma.
1 Thessalonians 5:11: Ase ayio, remania inwe ase inwe, na koagachana, kera omonto noyomwabo, buna mogokora.
1 Thessalonians 5:14-15: Twabasoroire, baminto, mokuurere abwo bare aboro, moremie abwo berusirie moyo, mokonye abwo bare abareu, remereria nabaanto bonsi. Rigereria ng’a onde taakana oyomwabo obobe ase obobe, korende botambe morigie gokorerana ayare amaya inwe ase inwe, na ase abanto bonsi.
1 Thessalonians 5:16-18: Goka botambe! Saba motari gotiga! Iraneria ng’a mbuya mono ase amang’ana onsi! Naki oko nakwo ogwancha kwa Nyasae ase more ase Kristo Yeso.
1 Thessalonians 5:23-24: Nyasae omonyene omorembe abachene kegima, na inwe abanyene morendwe ase emeika, na emioyo, na emebere, na mobe motari na komocha ekero ki’ogocha kw’Omonene oito Yeso Kristo. Ere oyobarangeirie nomwegenwa, nakore ayio.
2 Thessalonians 1:11-12: Ase ayio, nigo tokobasabera botambe, erio Nyasae oito ababare ng’a mwagweneire okorangeria kwaye. Ere aikeranie kera okogania kw’obuya, na kera emeremo y’okwegena, ase okobua kwaye, erinde erieta ri’Omonene oito Yeso ritogigwe ime yaino, na inwe ime yaye, koreng’ana nobuya bwa Nyasae oito, na Omonene Yeso Kristo.
2 Thessalonians 2:16-17: Bono Omonene oito Yeso Kristo omonyene, na Nyasae Tata oito, oyotwanchete na otoete okoremia gwa kare na kare, na ogosemeria okuya ase obuya bwaye, aremie chinkoro chiaino, na abakong’ie mokore ayare boronge ase kera ogokora okuya, na amang’ana amaya.
2 Thessalonians 3:3: Korende Omonene nomwegenwa, nere orababeeke chinguru na kobarenda korwa ase oria omobe.
2 Thessalonians 3:16: Bono Omonene bw’omorembe omonyene abae omorembe ase chingaki chionsi, na ase chinchera chionsi. Omonene abe amo nainwe mwensi.
1 Timothy 1:14-15: na obuya bwo Omonene oito bwamentekanire mono amo nokwegena na obwanchani ebire ime ase Kristo Yeso. Ring’ana eri neri’ekeene, rigwenerete gwancherwa kegima, ng’a Kristo Yeso nigo achete ase ense gotooria abanyene ebibe, na ase abwo inche noyo bw’eritang’ani.
1 Timothy 2:1-2: Gaaki, ritang’ani ase amang’ana onsi nabasoroire ng’a okoboria, na ogosaba, na okogaramera amo nokoiraneria Nyasae ng’a mbuya mono, bikoreke ase engencho y’abanto bonsi, ase engencho y’abarwoti, na bonsi abaeire okobua, erinde tonyaare koba nobogima bw’oboitongo na obw’omorembe, na ase amang’ana onsi koba ne chingeencho chi’obonyasae, na echi’ogosikana.
1 Timothy 4:8: Inaki okwenaria kw’omobere nokonyora ogoke, korende okwenaria gwe chingencho chi’obonyasae nokonyora ase amang’ana onsi, ekiagera nkore neira ase obogima bwa bono, na ase boria bogochia‐gocha.
1 Timothy 4:12: Monto onde tagochaaya ekiagera ore omosae, korende obe ekiorokererio ekiya ase abwo begenire, ase ogokwana, na ase orogeendo, naende ase obwanchani, na okwegena, na obochenu.
1 Timothy 6:6: Ekeene, okoba ne chingencho chi’obonyasae amo nogoisaneka nokonyora okonene,
1 Timothy 6:11-12: Korende aye, omonto o Nyasae, tama ayio onsi, rigia oboronge, ne chingeencho chi’obonyasae, na okwegena, na obwanchani, na oboremereria na obwororo. Rwana esegi ere engiya y’okwegena, bwata obogima bwa kare na kare, obo kwarangereretigwe konyora, na kwaorogetie ase okoorokia okuya ase obosio bw’abarori abange.
2 Timothy 1:7: ekiagera omoika twaetwe na Nyasae tari oyo bw’obwoba, korende oyo bw’echinguru na obwanchani, na omoika bw’okwerenga intwe abanyene.
2 Timothy 1:9: oyototooretie na agatorangeria ase okorangeria ogochenu, tari ase engencho y’ogokora gwaito korende koreng’ana nokorigia kwaye omonyene, na obuya bwaye. Obuya obo twaetwe ase Kristo Yeso korwa agwo kare
2 Timothy 2:1: Gaaki, aye omwana one, obe ne chinguru ase obuya bore ime ase Kristo Yeso.
2 Timothy 2:13: onye titori abegenwa, ere nigo are omwegenwa, ekiagera takonyara gwekaana ere omonyene.
2 Timothy 2:15: Kora buna oranyaare kweorokia ase obosio bwa Nyasae buna oyobwancheirwe nere, buna omokori emeremo oyotagwenereti gosookigwa, ogwatanana boronge ring’ana ri’ekeene.
2 Timothy 3:16-17: Kera ririiko riutire n’Omoika o Nyasae, nario riranyare gotworokereria, na gotokuurera, na gotorongeyia, na gototang’ana ase oboronge, erinde omonto o Nyasae abe oikeranigwe, oisanerigwe, anyare gokora kera ogokora okuya.
2 Timothy 4:7-8: Narwanire esegi ere engiya, nakoorire orogeendo, narendire okwegena. Magega ase aya nagacheirwe egutwa y’oboronge, eye Omonene, omogambi bw’oboronge, arang’e ase Rituko riria gose tari inche bweka arae, korende nabaanto bonsi abanchete okoorokigwa kwaye.
Titus 2:11-12: Inaki Nyasae oorokriie obuya bwaye ase ogotooreka ase Mwanyabaanto bonsi. Titus 3:4-5: Korende ekero oboitongo na obwanchani bwa Nyasae, Omotooria oito bwaorogetigwe, ere agatotooria, tari ase ogokora kw’oboronge twakorete intwe, korende ase amaabera aye ere omonyene ogosibigwa goetera ase Omoika Omochenu oyio ogotoa okoiborwa okoyia, na obogima oboyia.

Joel 3:16: Omonene narume korwa Sayoni, aake eriogi riaye korwa Yerusalemu; igoro na ense nchitengechigwe. Korende Omonene nabe obotamero bw’abaanto baye, na eburi enkong’u y’Abaisraeli.
Amos 5:14: Rigia ayare amaya, na tari ayare amabe, erio nario morabe moyo. Komorakore bo, Omonene, Nyasae bw’Emeganda, nabe amo nainwe, buna inwe mwatebiire.
Obadiah 1:17: “Korende ase egetunwa gia Sayoni mbabe aroro abaratooreke na aase agwo nabe aachenu. Abanto b’enyomba ya Yakobo nabairanerigwe ense yabo.
Jonah 2:2: agateeba, “Ekero narenge ase emechando, aye Omonene, ngakorangeria naye okangiraneria inche. Korwa ase endiba y’ense y’abakuure ’nkarera onkoye naye okanyigwa inche.
Micah 7:7: Korende inche omonyene nindigererie Omonene; ninganye inde nogosemeria ase Nyasae ore ogotooreka kwane; Nyasae one nanyigwe.
Habakkuk 2:4: Rora, oyo okweimokereria igoro, omoyo oye tori omooronge, korende omonyene oboronge nabe moyo goetera ase okwegena kwaye.
Haggai 2:9: Omonene bw’Emeganda nigo agoteeba ng’a obonene bw’enyomba eye ya bono nabobe obonene goetania obw’eria ya kare. Aase aiga nindete omorembe obe okogambao. Nabo Omonene bw’Emeganda atebiire.”
Zechariah 8:16-17: Amang’ana aya naro morakore: Kera omonto akwane ekeene noyomwabo; monache ebiina bia boronge na ebi’omorembe agwo ase ebiita biaino. Timobaisa gokora emeroberio emebe ase chinkoro chiaino ase ogokorerana bobe inwe ase inwe, gose timobaisa gwancha gotiana ogotiana kw’oborimo, ekiagera amang’ana ayio onsi nigo inyagechete. Nabo Omonene atebiire.”
Zechariah 8:23: Aya naro Omonene bw’Emeganda agoteeba: Ase amatuko ayio abanto ikomi ba kera egesaku bagokwana emenwa ao ao mbache babwate omokoba bw’omwambaro bw’Omoyahudi, bateebe: Intwe ntorigetie kogenda amo nainwe, ekiagera twaigure ng’a Nyasae nigo are amo nainwe.”
Malachi 4:2: Korende ase more inwe abamoirogete erieta riane, erioba ri’oboronge ’ndioroke rire nokogwenia inse ye chimbaaba chiaye. Inwe inamosoke mobe mogotiratiria buna chimori ekero chigosokigwa korwa ase obweri.
Matthew 5:16: Ase enchera eyio eyio, tiga omobaso oino obare boigo ase abanto, erio barore emeremo yaino emiya, batogie Iso oino ore igoro.
Matthew 6:20-21: korende mogache chinibo chiaino igoro, aase ebigwankwa na oboboosu bitagosoa, na abaibi batagotaagora na koiba. Ekiagera aase enibo yao ere, nao nenkoro yao ekoba.
Luke 6:36: Mobe namaabera, buna Iso oino are namaabera.
